scripts.clean:ports: for port in 3000 4000 5173; do lsof -ti :$port | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; echo 'Ports cleaned'
scripts.dev:web: bun run clean:ports && turbo run dev --filter=@autix/web --filter=@autix/api
scripts.dev:api: bun run clean:ports && turbo run dev --filter=@autix/api
scripts.dev:desktop: bun run clean:ports && turbo run dev --filter=@autix/desktop --filter=@autix/api
